title: Australian Braised Beef
description: A hearty beef dish originating from Australia, slow-cooked in a rich red wine sauce.
instructions: Season the short ribs with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat.
Sear the short ribs until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, about 10 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, and flour.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Return the short ribs to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the ribs rest for 10 minutes.
Serve the short ribs with the rich red wine sauce.
